V0001_01_00_01_0.text: If you are a true Duelist, I expect nothing less than your best strategies.

V0001_01_00_03_0.text: Marik...  I will never allow you to win!

V0001_01_00_03_1.text: I will send you back into the darkness!

V0001_01_00_04_0.text: Pegasus! I promise to win this Duel!

V0001_01_00_05_0.text: This battle will determine my destiny.

V0001_01_00_07_0.text: Your evil comes to an end, Bakura!

V0001_01_00_09_0.text: Mai, you are no match for me.

V0001_01_00_10_0.text: A true Duelist must face every challenge with all his heart!

V0001_01_00_11_0.text:
There's an aura about you...
You must be a Duelist!

V0001_01_00_12_0.text: If we both give our best, we'll have nothing to regret!

V0001_01_00_13_0.text: Once you step on the field, I can't show you any mercy!

V0001_01_00_14_0.text:
I will defeat you, Noah!
For Kaiba and Mokuba!

V0001_01_00_15_0.text: I must defeat Doma to save the world of Duel Monsters!

V0001_01_00_16_0.text: I sense he may be the most dangerous foe I've ever faced...

V0001_01_00_17_0.text:
Dartz!
Your time of terror is over!

V0001_01_00_18_0.text:
Best of luck, Leon!
And remember to have fun!

V0001_01_00_19_0.text:
It can't be...
This is a Shadow Game!

V0001_01_00_20_0.text: Our love of Duel Monsters transcends the barriers of time.

V0001_01_00_21_0.text: I want to Duel you just as much as you want to Duel me!

V0001_01_00_22_0.text: A future created from pain and chaos is no future at all!

V0001_03_00_01_0.text: Now isn't the time to let up!

V0001_04_00_02_0.text: I still believe in my cards! I draw!

V0001_05_00_00_0.text: Heart of the cards, guide me!

V0001_06_01_02_0.text: I expected you to do that.

V0001_06_01_03_0.text: Exactly what I was waiting for!

V0001_08_00_00_0.text:
Your own attack will be your downfall!
I activate Mirror Force!

V0001_08_00_01_0.text: I activate my Spell - Magical Dimension!

V0001_08_00_02_0.text: I activate my Trap - Magic Cylinder!

V0001_08_00_03_0.text: I activate my Spell - Monster Reborn!

V0001_08_00_04_0.text: I activate my Spell - Swords of Revealing Light!

V0001_08_00_05_0.text: I activate my Spell - Mystic Box!

V0001_08_00_07_0.text: I activate The Eye of Timaeus!

V0001_08_00_08_0.text: Our future is waiting for us - now is not the time to succumb!

V0001_08_00_08_1.text: Legend of Heart, reveal my dragon's true form!

V0001_08_00_10_0.text: I activate the Trap Card - Relay Soul!

V0001_08_00_11_0.text: I activate the Trap Card - Black Illusion!

V0001_08_00_11_1.text: During its activation turn, it protects Spellcasters on the field from your effects.

V0001_08_00_14_1.text: Kuribohs self-destruct one after another, but that's bad news for you.

V0001_08_00_15_0.text: I have everything I need to win.

V0001_08_00_15_1.text: The Spell Card, Black Luster Ritual!

V0001_08_00_17_0.text: It's time for me to use a Spell Card.

V0001_08_00_18_0.text: Meet the instrument of your destruction!  Fiend's Sanctuary!

V0001_08_00_20_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Dark Magic Veil!

V0001_08_00_20_1.text: I give up my LP to bring out this monster!

V0001_08_00_21_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Exchange!

V0001_08_00_22_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Double Spell!

V0001_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
De-Fusion!

V0001_08_00_24_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Diffusion Wave-Motion!

V0001_08_00_24_1.text: I pay LP to spread my monster's attack across your field!

V0001_08_00_25_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Soul Taker!

V0001_08_00_26_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Rebellion!

V0001_08_00_27_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Tricky Spell 4!

V0001_08_00_28_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Magicians Unite!

V0001_08_00_30_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Makiu, the Magical Mist!

V0001_08_00_31_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Attack the Moon!!

V0001_08_00_32_1.text: I destroy a Spell or Trap Card!

V0001_08_00_33_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Magic Gate of Miracles!

V0001_08_00_34_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Ancient Rules!

V0001_08_00_35_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Piercing the Darkness!

V0001_08_00_37_0.text: I will pierce through the darkness!

V0001_08_00_39_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Spiral Spear Strike!

V0001_08_00_41_0.text: I activate The Claw of Hermos's effect!

V0001_08_00_43_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Dark Magical Circle!

V0001_08_00_44_0.text: I activate Dark Magical Circle's effect!

V0001_08_00_45_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Dark Magic Inheritance!

V0001_08_00_46_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Bond Between Teacher and Student!

V0001_08_00_47_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dark Magic Twin Burst!

V0001_08_00_48_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dark Burning Attack!

V0001_08_00_49_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Dark Burning Magic!

V0001_08_00_50_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Dark Magic Attack!

V0001_08_00_51_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Dark Magic Expanded!

V0001_08_00_52_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Soul Servant!

V0001_08_00_53_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Magician's Salvation!

V0001_08_00_55_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Dark Magic Curtain!

V0001_08_00_56_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Secrets of Dark Magic!

V0001_08_00_57_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Sage's Stone!

V0001_08_00_58_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Spell!
Strength in Unity!

V0001_08_00_59_0.text: I activate Strength in Unity's effect!

V0001_08_00_60_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Magic Formula!

V0001_08_00_62_0.text: I activate the Spell, Dedication through Light and Darkness!

V0001_08_00_63_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Chaos Scepter Blast!

V0001_08_00_64_0.text: I Summon the Trap Monster, Dimension Reflector!

V0001_08_00_66_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Lightforce Sword!

V0001_08_00_66_1.text: I seal away a card that's in your hand!

V0001_08_00_67_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Soul Rope!

V0001_08_00_69_0.text:
How much of a risk taker are you?
I activate Greed!

V0001_08_00_70_0.text:
Pay for your misdeeds!
Mind Crush!

V0001_08_00_71_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Magical Hats!

V0001_08_00_72_0.text: I activate the Trap, Mystical Refpanel!

V0001_08_00_74_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
The Revived Sky God!

V0001_08_00_74_1.text:
Slifer the Sky Dragon!
Revive from the Graveyard!

V0001_08_00_75_0.text: I banish The Revived Sky God from my Graveyard!

V0001_08_00_76_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Eternal Soul!

V0001_08_00_78_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Miracle Restoring!

V0001_08_00_79_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Dark Magic Mirror Force!

V0001_08_00_80_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Destined Rivals!

V0001_08_00_81_0.text:
I activate my Trap Card!
Magician Navigation!

V0001_08_00_82_0.text: I activate Magician Navigation's effect from my Graveyard!

V0001_08_00_83_0.text:
I activate my Continuous Trap!
Magicians' Combination!

V0001_08_00_85_0.text:
Obelisk! Unleash your ultimate strength!
Soul Energy MAX!!!!

V0001_08_00_86_0.text: From my Graveyard, I activate the Trap, Soul Energy MAX!!!!

V0001_08_00_87_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
The Gaze of Timaeus!

V0001_09_00_04_0.text: Kuriboh explodes at the slightest touch.

V0001_09_00_04_1.text: Your attacks will never reach me!

V0001_09_00_05_0.text: Now for Dark Magician the Magician of Black Magic's effect!

V0001_09_00_06_0.text: Dark Magician Girl the Magician's Apprentice's effect!

V0001_09_00_08_0.text: Dark Flare Knight's effect activates when it's destroyed!

V0001_09_00_09_0.text: Red-Eyes Dark Dragoon activates its effect!

V0001_09_00_10_0.text: I activate Master of Chaos's effect!

V0001_09_00_12_0.text: I activate The Dark Magicians's effect!

V0001_09_00_13_0.text: Dark Magician the Knight of Dragon Magic's effect activates!

V0001_09_00_14_0.text: Dark Magician of Chaos activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_15_0.text: Sorcerer of Dark Magic activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_16_0.text: Dark Magician Knight activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_18_0.text: I activate Illusion of Chaos's effect!

V0001_09_00_20_0.text: I activate Apprentice Illusion Magician's effect!

V0001_09_00_21_0.text: Magician of Dark Illusion activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_25_0.text: I activate Skilled Dark Magician's effect!

V0001_09_00_27_0.text: Legendary Knight Timaeus activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_28_0.text: Legendary Knight Critias activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_29_0.text: Legendary Knight Hermos activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_30_0.text: Timaeus the Knight of Destiny's effect activates!

V0001_09_00_31_0.text: I activate Timaeus the United Dragon's effect!

V0001_09_00_34_0.text: Dark Magician Girl the Dragon Knight activates her effect!

V0001_09_00_36_0.text: Gorz the Emissary of Darkness activates from my hand!

V0001_09_00_37_0.text:
I have all 5 cards in my hand!
I Summon the mighty Exodia!

V0001_09_00_38_0.text:
Joey...
I know what to do!

V0001_09_00_40_0.text: The King and Queen's Knights call for Jack's Knight!

V0001_09_00_41_0.text: Arcana Knight Joker activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_42_0.text: Celtic Guard of Noble Arms activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_44_0.text: Breaker the Magical Warrior's effect activates!

V0001_09_00_45_0.text: I remove a Spell Counter to activate Breaker's effect!

V0001_09_00_50_0.text: I pay my LP to activate Ra's effect!

V0001_09_00_52_0.text: Dark Magician of Destruction activates his effect!

V0001_09_00_53_0.text: I activate Timaeus the United Magical Dragon's effect!

V0001_11_00_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Attack Position!

V0001_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0001_13_00_01_0.text: The great Dark Magician has a disciple who can more than hold her own!

V0001_13_00_01_1.text: Say hello to Dark Magician Girl!

V0001_13_00_02_1.text: I call forth Slifer the Sky Dragon!

V0001_13_00_03_0.text: My furry friend may appear weak, but you should never judge a book by its cover.

V0001_13_00_04_0.text: I call forth Obelisk the Tormentor!

V0001_13_00_05_0.text: I call forth The Winged Dragon of Ra!

V0001_13_00_06_0.text: In the name of the Pharaoh, the three Egyptian Gods become one!

V0001_13_00_08_0.text: Meet Dark Magician Girl the Dragon Knight!

V0001_13_00_11_0.text: I call upon Magician of Black Chaos!

V0001_13_00_12_0.text: I discard 1 card to Special Summon The Tricky!

V0001_13_00_14_0.text: I Xyz Summon Ebon Illusion Magician!

V0001_13_00_15_0.text: I Xyz Summon Legendary Magician of Dark!

V0001_13_00_16_0.text: The forces of light and darkness intertwine!

V0001_13_00_16_1.text: I open the gates of chaos!

V0001_13_00_17_0.text: You may think your strength is infinite... but that's still not enough!

V0001_13_00_17_1.text: For now there's a force beyond infinity! Timaeus the Knight of Destiny!

V0001_13_00_18_0.text: Joey, I can use your help!

V0001_13_00_19_0.text: Dark Magician the Magician of Black Magic!

V0001_13_00_20_0.text: Dark Magician Girl the Magician's Apprentice!

V0001_13_00_21_0.text:
Behold!
The supreme Dragon Master Knight!

V0001_13_00_30_0.text: Dark Magician the Knight of Dragon Magic!

V0001_13_00_31_0.text: Emerge from the darkness of chaos!

V0001_13_00_47_0.text:
Join me!
Timaeus the United Dragon!

V0001_13_00_48_0.text: Here comes Gaia The Fierce Knight!

V0001_13_00_52_0.text:
Alpha! Beta! Gamma!
My three Magnet Warriors! Combine!

V0001_13_00_58_0.text: Joey's card lives inside my Deck!

V0001_13_00_59_0.text: Joey and I are fighting together!

V0001_13_00_63_0.text: I give rise to the defender of the imperial throne!

V0001_13_00_71_0.text:
Come here!
The Winged Dragon of Ra - Sphere Mode!

V0001_13_00_72_0.text:
From the ashes!
The Winged Dragon of Ra - Immortal Phoenix!

V0001_13_00_73_0.text:
Enter the Duel!
Ebon High Magician!

V0001_13_00_75_0.text: Feast your eyes on Timaeus the United Magical Dragon!

V0001_18_00_00_0.text: I attack your Life Points directly!

V0001_18_00_01_0.text: My monster attacks your Life Points directly!

V0001_19_00_06_0.text: I attack with Dark Magician Girl the Dragon Knight!

V0001_19_00_08_0.text: I attack with Legendary Knight Timaeus!

V0001_19_00_09_0.text: Magician of Black Chaos will take you down!

V0001_19_00_10_0.text:
Dark Magician the Magician of Black Magic!
Gooo!

V0001_19_00_11_0.text:
Dark Magician Girl the Magician's Apprentice!
Attack!

V0001_19_00_20_0.text:
Dark Magician the Dragon Knight!
Attack!

V0001_19_00_21_0.text:
Dark Magician the Knight of Dragon Magic!
Attack!

V0001_19_00_28_0.text:
Apprentice Illusion Magician!
Cast your spell!

V0001_19_00_38_0.text:
Timaeus the Knight of Destiny!
Attack!

V0001_19_00_43_0.text:
Swift Gaia the Fierce Knight!
Hit fast and hard!

V0001_19_00_50_0.text:
Gorz the Emissary of Darkness!
Attack!

V0001_19_00_51_0.text: My Emissary of Darkness Token attacks!

V0001_19_00_60_0.text:
Celtic Guard of Noble Arms!
Slash!

V0001_19_00_69_0.text:
Timaeus the United Magical Dragon!
Attack!

V0001_21_00_02_0.text: That's the end... of my turn...

V0001_21_00_03_0.text: Whatever strategy you play, I'll come up with one better!

V0001_21_00_04_0.text: With this, I end my turn!

V0001_21_00_05_0.text:
I've never lost faith in my Deck.
And I won't start now!

V0001_27_00_01_0.text: My cards will not fail me.

V0001_27_00_02_0.text: I can still turn this Duel around...

V0001_28_00_01_0.text: It's not whether you win or lose. It's how you play the game.

V0001_28_00_01_1.text: And for that, this was a great Duel.

V0001_28_00_02_1.text: I'm looking forward to a rematch.

V0001_28_00_03_0.text: True champions play with honor, Weevil!

V0001_28_00_04_0.text: Mai, you taught me a lot today.  And for that, I thank you.

V0001_28_00_04_1.text: I had to confront my own fears and weaknesses, or I could never have defeated you.

V0001_28_00_05_0.text: I wouldn't have been victorious had it not been for the help of my cards and my friends.

V0001_28_00_06_1.text: You will never win if you give in to hatred.

V0001_28_00_07_0.text: As long as I have a bond with my cards, I will never lose!

V0001_28_00_08_0.text:
Noah!
Your attempts to manipulate our minds have failed!

V0001_28_00_09_0.text: There is no justice in destroying the world!

V0001_28_00_10_0.text: Rafael, I know how much you've suffered.

V0001_28_00_11_0.text:
Dartz!
I won't let my darkness conquer me again!

V0001_28_00_12_0.text:
Zigfried!
A real Duelist wouldn't disrespect the game!

V0001_28_00_13_0.text: Leon, I know you love to Duel just as much as I do!

V0001_28_00_14_0.text: I will not let your evil plan come to pass, Anubis!

V0001_28_00_15_0.text: The bond we formed today will stand the test of time.

V0001_28_00_16_0.text: The future is what we make of it, Paradox!

V0001_29_00_01_0.text: I may have lost, but I have no regrets.

V0001_29_00_01_1.text: For it was a fantastic Duel.

V0001_29_00_03_0.text: You have defeated me, my friend.

V0001_29_00_04_1.text: You have shown that you are a true Duelist!

V0001_29_00_05_0.text: There was nothing I could do...

V0001_29_00_07_0.text: It's hard to figure you out because you play by instinct.

V0001_29_00_08_0.text: The bond you have with Stardust Dragon is incredible!

V0001_33_00_02_0.text: This is my key to victory!

V0001_34_00_00_0.text: I challenge you to a Duel. This will be fun!

V0001_34_00_01_0.text: Sweating already? The game's only just begun!

V0001_34_00_02_0.text: You are a Duelist of remarkable skill, but I never back down from a challenge!

V0001_34_00_03_0.text: This is bad... If I don't do something soon, there's no way I can win!

V0001_34_00_04_0.text: Argh... You will never break my fire!

V0001_34_00_05_0.text: I've assembled all the pieces for victory!

V0001_34_00_07_0.text: I'm impressed that you can hold your own against me.

V0001_34_00_08_0.text: You still haven't figured out my strategy, have you?

V0001_34_00_09_0.text: You will pay for your misdeeds!

V0001_36_00_00_0.text:
They're still hiding something.
Be careful!

V0001_36_00_02_0.text: As long as we have a chance to win, we can never give up!

V0001_36_00_05_0.text: This is all on you, Yugi!

V0001_36_00_06_0.text: I'm certain you'll make the right moves.

V0001_37_00_00_0.text: I unite these heroes in the ultimate Fusion Summon!
